member.name: M:BsDiff.BinaryPatchUtility.Create(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Creates a binary patch (in bsdiff format) that can be used (by ) to transform into .
member.param: A to which the patch will be written.

member.name: M:BsDiff.BinaryPatchUtility.Apply(System.IO.Stream,System.Func{System.IO.Stream},System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Applies a binary patch (in bsdiff format) to the data in and writes the results of patching to .
member.param: A func that can open a positioned at the start of the patch data. This stream must support reading and seeking, and must allow multiple streams on the patch to be opened concurrently.
A to which the patched data is written.

member.name: M:BsDiff.BinaryPatchUtility.ReadExactly(System.IO.Stream,System.Int32)
member.param: The count of bytes to read.
member.returns: A new byte array containing the data read from the stream.

member.name: M:BsDiff.BinaryPatchUtility.ReadExactly(System.IO.Stream,System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads exactly bytes from into , starting at the byte given by .
member.param: The buffer to read data into.
The offset within the buffer at which data is first written.
The count of bytes to read.

member.name: M:BsDiff.BsTool.Patch(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Apply a Diff from to resulting in the creation of
member.param: File to be created from patching with
Diff file used for transforming into

member.name: M:BsDiff.BsTool.CreateDiff(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a Diff from to resulting in the creation of
member.param: File that is compared to to create
Diff file to be created for transforming into
